evals.description: Triggers on chart of accounts design request
evals.prompt: Help me design a chart of accounts for a SaaS startup that has subscription revenue, professional services, and hardware sales
Our books show $142,500 in cash but our bank statement shows $139,800. Walk me through how to reconcile this
We keep paying invoices late and our vendors are complaining. Design an accounts payable process for a 50-person company
We have $200K in invoices over 90 days past due. What process should we follow to collect?
Our month-end close takes 15 business days. How can we get it down to 5?

evals.description: Correctly explains double-entry bookkeeping for a payment
evals.prompt: Show me the journal entry for paying a $2,000 vendor invoice that was previously recorded as accounts payable

evals.description: Can explain accrual vs cash basis with correct implications
evals.prompt: We're switching from cash basis to accrual accounting. What changes and why does it matter?

evals.description: Correctly designs an auto-reversing accrual entry
evals.prompt: We have $30,000 in December payroll that won't be paid until January 3rd. How do I record this?

evals.description: Identifies the anti-pattern of using a Miscellaneous account
evals.prompt: Our bookkeeper puts anything unusual into a single Miscellaneous Expense account. Is this a problem?

evals.description: Can describe COA numeric range conventions
evals.prompt: What numbering scheme should I use for my chart of accounts?

evals.description: Does not trigger for tax strategy questions
evals.prompt: What tax deductions can I take for my home office to minimize my business tax bill this year?

evals.description: Can design an expense management workflow end-to-end
evals.prompt: Build me an end-to-end expense reimbursement process for a 100-person remote company
